response.justification: Bogdan is a highly technical and experienced software engineer with an impressive open-source background. However, he falls short of the executive-level leadership and formal team management experience required for a Head of Development role. Most critically, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 minimum requirement necessary for this client-facing consulting position.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience in modern software development, microservices, and architecture across diverse tech stacks.
Strong commitment to open-source technologies and Linux environments, demonstrated by founding and maintaining GISCollective.
Proven ability to mentor developers and share knowledge through technical workshops, Refactoring Dojos, and Code Katas.
concerns: Basic German language skills fall significantly short of the required C1 minimum for client advising.
Lacks executive-level leadership and formal team management experience expected of a Head of Development.
No demonstrated expertise in formal UML modeling, enterprise IT security, or compliance and risk management.
